Legend — NbS Type
🌿 NbS Typology & Taxonomy
Based on your Core Concept Framework. Aligned with IUCN (2016) and EU Adaptation Strategy (2021). Includes primary types and secondary sub-typologies.
🔎 NbS Finder
Tell us about your context and we'll match you to the most relevant Nature-based Solutions — with evidence, implementation guidance, funding options and governance requirements.
1 What is your primary climate challenge?
2 What type of territory are you working in?
3 At what governance scale?
Matched NbS solutions
📍 Comparable Cases
Find the most relevant implemented NbS cases from across Europe based on your context. Results are ranked by similarity to your situation.
💼 Business Case
Evidence on effectiveness, co-benefits and risk reduction potential for each NbS type, drawn from the knowledge base. Use this to justify NbS investment to decision-makers and funders.
🗺️ Implementation Pathway
Step-by-step implementation guidance for each NbS type — from feasibility assessment through to long-term monitoring. Each step identifies key actions, typical timelines, and common barriers drawn from European case studies.
💶 Funding Navigator
EU and national funding instruments relevant to each NbS type. Includes eligibility, typical grant ranges, and practical tips drawn from successful applications in your knowledge base.
⚖️ Policy Alignment
EU directives, strategies and regulations that support each NbS type — with specific commitments, legal bindingness, and links to the full policy documents in your knowledge base.
🏛️ Governance Requirements
Who needs to be at the table, what governance model works best, and what coordination mechanisms are required for each NbS type. Based on European case study evidence.
